description: Indexed HammerGen skills for O(1) lookups by ID, name, or attribute

5caddb56a48cc24ecc4eca90.name: Secret Signs
5caddb56a48cc24ecc4eca90.description: Ability to make and understand clandestine  signs known only to a closed group.

5ce909813f5a0e36c0a4bab6.name: Lore - Witches
5ce909813f5a0e36c0a4bab6.description: You have vast knowledge of witches.

5cadc7bb828dc9389cc7b15f.name: Lore - Plants
5cadc7bb828dc9389cc7b15f.description: You have a broad knowledge and possibly a formal training in botany.

5cdfbd2c30259922e8ea210b.name: Lore - Local
5cdfbd2c30259922e8ea210b.description: You have a broad knowledge of geography, history, people, and culture of a particular area.

5cadc6a3828dc9389cc7b15a.name: Language
5cadc6a3828dc9389cc7b15a.description: Ability to speak a particular language other  than native one.

5cea8ed1adaed446d44365ec.name: Play
5cea8ed1adaed446d44365ec.description: You can play an instrument. The SL of the Play Test shows how much others like your performance.

5cadc5d8828dc9389cc7b158.name: Consume Alcohol
5cadc5d8828dc9389cc7b158.description: Ability to handle alcohol without  suffering its negative consequences.

5cadd044828dc9389cc7b16c.name: Gossip
5cadd044828dc9389cc7b16c.description: Allows to quickly find useful gossips and spread rumors efficiently.

5ce8518006ad2230542604e3.name: Track
5ce8518006ad2230542604e3.description:
You can recognize the most subtle signs that allows you to follow others.
This Skill can be also used to hide your own trail. Whoever is following you will have to take Track Test Opposed by your Track Test.
Tracking usually requires an Extended Test with the Difficulty modified by factors such as: how fresh the trail is, etc.
GM my chose to use Pursuit rules to check if you are able to track down a fleeing animal.

5ca91ce545b5ad53fc7b080e.name: Animal Care
5ca91ce545b5ad53fc7b080e.description: Allows to care for animals, and heal them.

5ce84fb806ad2230542604e2.name: Swim
5ce84fb806ad2230542604e2.description:
You can swim. Swimming in calm water does not need a Test to succeed.
The test is required if there are any adverse conditions such as: currents, cold water, extra encumbrance, etc.
In combat, Swim is used when fighting in the water (deep). It replaces skills like Athletics to govern Movement. Your swim speed is half of your Movement speed.

5ce93cd3d836af2ec4248aab.name: Lore - Local - Altdorf
5ce93cd3d836af2ec4248aab.description: You have a broad knowledge of geography, history, people, and culture of Altdorf.

5ce984f11140dc34041696a0.name: Row
5ce984f11140dc34041696a0.description:
By having a level in this Skill, you are automatically assumed to be able to row in calm water.
The Row Skill Test is usually necessary when rowing in some adverse conditions or racing.

5cea8a12adaed446d44365e5.name: Lore - Dwarfs
5cea8a12adaed446d44365e5.description: You have a vast knowledge of culture and history of Dwarfs in the Old World.

You can use Sail as a basic Skill with any other Specialisations.

Having a level in any specialisation of Sail, allows you to use Sail as basic Skill with any other Specialisations.

In combat, Stealth can be used to prepare for an Ambush.

5d167ce1339d63247c167c68.description: Lets you commune with your deity. In combat, each round you pray, you gain 1 Advantage point up to a maxim of your Fellowship Bonus. If you opponents can understand you and fear your deity, you can use pray as if it was Intimidate Skill.

5d18f3d9eeb0ed74f060f691.name: Lore - Dragons

You know how to set and disarm traps. Everyone with this Skill can set and disarm traps without any Test if given enough time.
The test is necessary if trap is unusually complex or if there is a time pressure.
Most traps require Average (+20) Set Trap Test to succeed. More complex traps may require an extended Test that needs multiple SL over a number of rounds.

5cea55d10bf34d4a646aa973.name: Lore - Heraldry

5ce9ce54179ba450886fba81.description:
Let's you perform nimble hand movements that allow to pick pockets, perform car/coin tricks, etc. Test of this Skill is usually Opposed by the Perception of your target.
You can also use this Skill in gambling.  Before any round you may attempt Sleight of Hand Test (Opposed if other are suspecting you). If you succeed to may reverse your Gamble Test tat round if necessary.

5ce8410d3ec45d1a88e33239.name: Charm Animal

Allows you to befriend or subjugate animals.
Take an Opposed Charm Animal/Willpower test. If the animal(s) is docile, this Test is not Opposed. You can influence WP Bonus + SL animals at once.
In combat, if you succeed, any affected animals will not attack you this round and you gain +1 Advantage. You can use this skill every Round until you fail the Test. After failing, you cannot use it on the same animals anymore.

5ce116570f123f1f14a4cc67.name: Navigation

Celestial Wizards read future from the stars.
Mystics use tools such as cards or dice.
Consulting the Thaumodivinator in Altdorf.
Consorting with Daemons. 
You can make a single Augury Test one per day.
